title: [A Frozen Battlefield, Trench]
description: The crumbling stones appear to be rapidly losing their war with the encroaching ice, and huge chunks of rock have fallen to the trench floor, revealing the frozen dirt beneath the stone reinforcement of the battlements.  While the howling wind has been thwarted in its attempt to broach this cover, the falling snow has not.

wayto.3249:
;e empty_hands
move 'climb south wall'
waitrt?
fill_hands
wayto.3258:
;e empty_hands
move 'climb north wall'
waitrt?
fill_hands
wayto.3260: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'east'
wayto.3262: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'northwest'
